data.title: 国际服Arcie小编普拉娜换装回 #16
data.summary: [Blue Archive Live Stream #16] It’s that time of the month already, Sensei! CM A.R.C.I.E is returnin
data.body:
[Blue Archive Live Stream #16]

It’s that time of the month already, Sensei!
CM A.R.C.I.E is returning tomorrow for another fun stream with everyone – Don’t miss it!

🗓️Date & Time: 9/26 (Thu) 0:00 AM (UTC)
➡️YouTube Link: [https://youtube.com/live/pL9f4e_ebfc](https://youtube.com/live/pL9f4e_ebfc)
